name: io.github.brazilayer/mcp
title: Brazilayer — Brazilian Public Data
description: Brazilian company registry (CNPJ) + sanctions screening for AI agents. Pay per call via x402.

environmentVariables.name: BRAZILAYER_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key (0x…) of the wallet that pays for calls (USDC on Base). Optional: without it, only the free sample tools work.
